verse_text: Therefore I exhort first of all that supplications, prayers, intercessions, and giving of thanks be made for all men,

links.context: God's people have always been called to pray for the... king and all who are in authority (see [[JER.27:6]]-8; 36:4-7; [[ROM.13:1]]-7; [[1TI.2:1]], [[1TI.2:2]]).
